frontend_analysis.communication_type: SSE (expected per design doc; chat API not captured in network — likely SSR-embedded or EventSource)

key_endpoints.chat_api: not captured — URL navigation to /chats/{id} suggests SSR or embedded stream

ai_response: I'm doing well, thanks for asking! It's early afternoon in Seoul right now, so I imagine you might be in the middle of your day. How's your Thursday going so far—busy and productive, or more on the relaxed side?

response_rendering.format: chat bubble (plain text, no markdown rendering observed)
response_rendering.streaming: appeared as complete text (streaming not visually confirmed due to 15s wait)

notes: User not logged in — anonymous chat mode. Behavior may differ for authenticated users.
URL changes from copilot.microsoft.com to /chats/{id} on prompt send — full page navigation rather than SPA routing.
Chat API call not visible in DevTools Network — may use SSR-embedded response or EventSource not captured during navigation.
107 requests mostly JS bundles from Cloudflare CDN + OneCollector telemetry.
SSR architecture indicated by entry-ssr-wdnurIqP.js — server-side rendering may complicate HAR-based analysis.
Phase 2 recommendation: Capture HAR with authenticated session to observe actual SSE chat API endpoint.
